transcription.text: I'm Bob Warren. We're in the cold room of the Union Ice Company here in San Fernando, California, where the temperature never gets above freezing. We're here to make a surprising test on this new kind of garden hose, the new Everflex by BF Goodrich. We want to prove to you just how flexible Everflex really is, even at low temperatures. So as a test, we actually froze an Everflex garden hose in this cake of ice. Now you can imagine what freezing would do to most hoses, but now we're going to break the ice and see what it did to Everflex. You ready? Hit it. You can see for yourself, not a snarl, kink, or curl with Everflex. So flexible that even at 32 degrees, it coils with ease. The amazing new Everflex garden hose. Easiest hose you ever handled at any temperature. Everflex at hardware and garden stores now.

metadata.title: Everflex Garden Hose by B.F. Goodrich
